inst.name: MB
inst.short-description: A helper component used to make an event process invokable from a webService (wsgateway) or other event processes.
inst.long-description: A helper component used to make an event process invokable from a webService (wsgateway) or other event processes.

inputport-instance.name: SOAP11_GetCustomerInfo_RESPONSE
inputport-instance.description: Response XML for operation GetCustomerInfo

inputport-instance.name: SOAP11_GetCustomerInfo_FAILURE
inputport-instance.description: Error response XML for operation GetCustomerInfo

inst.name: T24
inst.short-description: Axis2 client which invokes a web service (usually externally hosted on a third-party system) based on the configured WSDL.
inst.long-description: Axis2 client which invokes a web service (usually externally hosted on a third-party system) based on the configured WSDL.

inputport-instance.name: TogetCustomerInformation__IN_PORT
inputport-instance.description: Takes input xml required by WS

inputport-instance.name: ToGetExchangeRate__IN_PORT
inputport-instance.description: Takes input xml required by WS

inputport-instance.name: ToGetAccountList__IN_PORT
inputport-instance.description: Takes input xml required by WS

inputport-instance.name: ToGetAccountInfo__IN_PORT
inputport-instance.description: Takes input xml required by WS

outputport-instance.name: TogetCustomerInformation__OUT_PORT
outputport-instance.description: Gives the output of WS in XML format

outputport-instance.name: ToGetExchangeRate__OUT_PORT
outputport-instance.description: Gives the output of WS in XML format

outputport-instance.name: ToGetAccountList__OUT_PORT
outputport-instance.description: Gives the output of WS in XML format

outputport-instance.name: ToGetAccountInfo__OUT_PORT
outputport-instance.description: Gives the output of WS in XML format

inst.name: GLegalID
inst.short-description: This component invokes a web service (usually externally hosted on a third-party system) based on the configured WSDL
inst.long-description: This component invokes a web service (usually externally hosted on a third-party system) based on the configured WSDL

inputport-instance.name: IN_PORT
inputport-instance.description: Takes input xml required by WS

outputport-instance.name: OUT_PORT
outputport-instance.description: Gives the output of WS in XML format

resource-properties.resource-property: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xalan="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:datetime="http://exslt.org/dates-and-times" xmlns:math="http://exslt.org/math" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:lxslt="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:java="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:set="http://exslt.org/sets" exclude-result-prefixes="xalan java lxslt" xmlns:ns12="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMOBOUTFASTV2" xmlns:ns33="http://temenos.com/CUSTOMER" xmlns:ns24="http://temenos.com/CPBGETACCOUNTINFO" xmlns:ns20="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBSVLPAYMENT" xmlns:ns2="http://temenos.com/DEVMB3/ToGetAccountInfo/Output" xmlns:ns7="http://temenos.com/CPBGETINTERESTRATE" xmlns:ns1="http://jaxb.dev.java.net/array" xmlns:ns14="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBTHPAYMENT" xmlns:ns26="http://temenos.com/CPBGETACCOUNTSTMT" xmlns:ns30="http://temenos.com/AAARRANGEMENTACTIVITY" xmlns:ns27="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBBILL" xmlns:ns25="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGMWTMB" xmlns:ns38="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBACCTOACCT" xmlns:ns40="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:ns36="http://temenos.com/AAARRANGEMENTACTIVITYOPENFD" xmlns:ns39="http://temenos.com/DEVMB3" xmlns:ns31="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTPHONEFTMB" xmlns:ns18="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBRFTFTMB" xmlns:ns23="http://temenos.com/CPBGETCUSTOMERINFO" xmlns:ns16="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBBKGMB" xmlns:ns15="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMMSPAYMENT" xmlns:ns21="http://temenos.com/CPBGETACCOUNTLIST" xmlns:ns28="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBWATERBILL" xmlns:ns34="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBQRPAYMENT" xmlns:ns6="http://temenos.com/CPBGETEXCHANGERATE" xmlns:ns9="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBETAXPAYMENT" xmlns:ns8="http://temenos.com/AAARRANGEMENTACTIVITYCPBDMD" xmlns:ns32="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBPPWSABILL" xmlns:ns17="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBUTILITYBILL" xmlns:ns35="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFER" xmlns:ns19="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBACBILL" xmlns:ns5="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBTOPUP" xmlns:ns4="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBBILLTOPUPREFUND" xmlns:ns13="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBWINGOUT" xmlns:ns11="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBEDCBILL" xmlns:ns10="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBSRBILL" xmlns:ns37="http://temenos.com/CUSTOMERCPBDMD" xmlns:ns29="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBMBANUALFEE" xmlns:ns22="http://temenos.com/FUNDSTRANSFERCPBFUNANBILL" xmlns:AppendZero="AppendZero" xmlns:EnDe="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:MD5Hex="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:Md5UniCode="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:ReplaceText="ReplaceText" xmlns:StringLength="StringLength" xmlns:dateConversion="dateConversion" xmlns:myext="myext" xmlns:replace="replace" xmlns:rounding="rounding" xmlns:sringindex="sringindex" xmlns:strings="strings" xmlns:truncateString="truncateString" extension-element-prefixes="datetime set math AppendZero EnDe MD5Hex Md5UniCode ReplaceText StringLength dateConversion myext replace rounding sringindex strings truncateString"> <xsl:import href="GLOBAL_FUNCLET_PATH"></xsl:import> <xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8" xalan:indent-amount="2" omit-xml-declaration="no"></xsl:output> <xsl:variable name="document" select="/"></xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="document_IN_PORT" select="document('IN_PORT')"></xsl:variable> <xsl:template match="/"> <AccountInfoRp> <ErrorCode> <xsl:variable name="if0"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="(count($document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType))<=('0')"> <xsl:value-of select="'124'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:STATUSCODE"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if0"></xsl:value-of> </ErrorCode> <ErrorMsg> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:STATUDESC"></xsl:value-of> </ErrorMsg> <AccountCcy> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:ACCOUNTCCY"></xsl:value-of> </AccountCcy> <AccountBalance> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:ACCOUNTBAL"></xsl:value-of> </AccountBalance> <AccountBalanceAvaliable> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:ACCTAVLBAL"></xsl:value-of> </AccountBalanceAvaliable> <AccountBranchOpen> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:ACCTBRANCH"></xsl:value-of> </AccountBranchOpen> <AccountName> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:SHORTTITLE"></xsl:value-of> </AccountName> <CustomerID> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:CUSTOMER"></xsl:value-of> </CustomerID> <DepositTerm> <xsl:variable name="if1"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="($document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:TAXAMT)=('0')"> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:TERM"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if1"></xsl:value-of> </DepositTerm> <InterestRate> <xsl:variable name="if2"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="($document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:TAXAT)!=('0')"> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:TAXAT"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if2"></xsl:value-of> </InterestRate> <StartDate> <xsl:variable name="if3"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="($document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:OPENINGDATE)=('')"> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:OPENINGDATE"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if3"></xsl:value-of> </StartDate> <RollOver> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:ROLOVER"></xsl:value-of> </RollOver> <MaturityDate> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:MATURITY"></xsl:value-of> </MaturityDate> <WithholdingTax> <xsl:variable name="if4"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="($document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:TAXAMT)=('0')"> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="concat(rounding:round(string($document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:TAXAMT),string('2')),'',$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:ACCOUNTCCY)"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if4"></xsl:value-of> </WithholdingTax> <InterestAferTax> <xsl:variable name="if5"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="($document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:TOTALINTEREST)!=('')"> <xsl:value-of select="concat(format-number(rounding:round(string(($document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:TOTALINTEREST)-($document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:TAXAMT)),string('2')),''),' ',$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:ACCOUNTCCY)"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if5"></xsl:value-of> </InterestAferTax> <phoneNumber> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:PHNO"></xsl:value-of> </phoneNumber> <AccountType> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns39:ToGetAccountInfoResponse/CPBGETACCOUNTINFOType/ns24:gCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:mCPBGETACCOUNTINFODetailType/ns24:ACCTCATEGORY"></xsl:value-of> </AccountType> </AccountInfoRp> </xsl:template> <!--The list of Extensions defined by user--> <lxslt:component prefix="rounding" functions="round"> <lxslt:script lang="javascript"><![CDATA[function round(value, decimals) { return Number(Math.round(value+'e'+decimals)+'e-'+decimals); }]]></lxslt:script> </lxslt:component> </xsl:stylesheet>

inputport-instance.name: IN_PORT
inputport-instance.description: Transforms input XML based on Mappings defined and generates an output XML.

outputport-instance.name: OUT_PORT

inst.name: CBS1
inst.short-description: Axis2 client which invokes a web service (usually externally hosted on a third-party system) based on the configured WSDL.
inst.long-description: Axis2 client which invokes a web service (usually externally hosted on a third-party system) based on the configured WSDL.

inputport-instance.name: GetAccountListJoin__IN_PORT
inputport-instance.description: Takes input xml required by WS

inputport-instance.description: Takes input xml required by WS

outputport-instance.name: GetAccountListJoin__OUT_PORT
outputport-instance.description: Gives the output of WS in XML format

outputport-instance.description: Gives the output of WS in XML format
